zh: 這時期的孩童會從爸媽哪裡學到了「好」和「壞」、
en: At this age, children learn "good" and "bad" from their parents,
grasping what should and should not be done.

zh: 也會想得到父母的寵愛、
en: They long for their parents' affection,

zh: 怕受父母的疏遠和各種懲罰、
en: and fear being distanced or punished.

zh: 這個時期的孩子會積極學習、
en: Children at this stage learn very actively,

zh: 當父母的千萬別寵壞小孩。
en: so parents — please, never spoil your child.
